items.title: Man City players to refund fans after Bodø loss
items.summary: Manchester City's captains have announced they will refund the cost of tickets for nearly 400 supporters.

items.title: Hayes: Returning Rodman ready for 'next steps'
items.summary: USWNT coach Emma Hayes said Trinity Rodman is ready to shoulder more responsibility and take the "next steps" in her career as she returns to the national team.

items.title: Liverpool beat Marseille to close in on UCL last 16
items.summary: Dominik Szoboszlai helped Liverpool to a 3-0 victory in Marseille that made a Champions League top-eight finish all the more likely.

items.title: Fermin sparks Barça rally as Yamal serves ban
items.summary: Barcelona overcame a scare to boost their hopes of automatic qualification for the Champions League last 16 with a hard-fought 4-2 win at Slavia Prague.

items.title: Benfica en Mourinho meldden zich bij Resink voor winterse transfer
items.summary: Stije Resink kan mogelijk alsnog een mooie transfer maken deze winter. Benfica heeft zich namelijk bij de middenvelder van FC Groningen gemeld. Dat bevestigen ingewijden.

items.title: Chelsea keep top eight hopes alive with win over Pafos
items.summary: Moises Caicedo's 77th-minute goal keeps Chelsea's hopes of finishing in the Champions League top eight alive after victory of Pafos at Stamford Bridge.

items.title: Schouten probeert vinger op de zere plek van PSV te leggen
items.summary: Jerdy Schouten probeerde de vinger op de zere plek te leggen nadat PSV in de Champions League verloren had van Newcastle United. De aanvoerder erkende dat zijn ploeg zichzelf de das omgedaan heeft.

items.title: PSV op Rapport: slechts vier voldoendes, dikke onvoldoende Gasiorowski en Wanner
items.summary: PSV beleefde een rampzalige avond bij Newcastle United. De dikke nederlaag leverde slechts vier voldoendes op bij de ploeg van Peter Bosz. Yarek Gasiorowski en Paul Wanner kregen een dikke onvoldoende. De rapportcijfers.

items.title: PSV stelt coëfficiënten-teleur, maar ziet Juventus en Bayern te hulp schieten
items.summary: PSV heeft op bezoek bij Newcastle United nagelaten zich te verzekeren van een plek in de tussenronde van de Champions Leaague, maar zag ook de coëfficiënten-concurrenten uit België en Portugal eveneens teleurstellen.

items.title: 'Players buying into Rosenior!' | Sidwell hails 'superb' Chelsea despite narrow win
items.summary: Steve Sidwell believes the Chelsea players are buying into Liam Rosenior after a 'superb' Champions League performance in their win over Pafos.

items.title: Newcastle secure last-16 play-off spot after comfortable win over PSV
items.summary: Newcastle United clinch a Champions League last 16 play-off spot following a comfortable 3-0 win over PSV Eindhoven at St James's Park.

items.title: VI Live: rampzalige avond PSV in Newcastle, personele problemen richting Bayern
items.summary: PSV stuit woensdag op Newcastle United in speelronde zeven van de competitiefase van de Champions League. In deze VI Live mis je niets van dat belangrijke duel.

items.title: Champions League as it happened: Liverpool cruise to win over Marseille
items.summary: Enjoy Wednesday's UEFA Champions League action with matches such as Marseille against Liverpool, Juventus against Benfica and Slavia Prague against Barcelona.

items.title: Szoboszlai’s low blow and Salah’s return in Marseille put Liverpool on a high
items.summary: Liverpool and Arne Slot continue to find their release on European soil. What had been billed as an intimidating, intense examination of the faltering Premier League champions by Roberto De Zerbi’s Marseille proved nothing of the sort as Slot’s side moved confidently towards automatic qualification for the last 16 of the Champions League. Dominik Szoboszlai, an own goal forced by Jeremie Frimpong and the substitute Cody Gakpo brought Liverpool a merited victory in the south of France plus a ninth win in 11 European away fixtures under Slot. The margin of victory could have been even greater but, having struggled to turn possession into chances and chances into wins of late, the Liverpool head coach will take satisfaction from a comprehensive triumph all the same. Continue reading...

items.title: Kaptein goal sends Chelsea into seventh straight League Cup final
items.summary: Holders Chelsea reach a seventh successive final of the Women's League Cup with a narrow victory over rivals Manchester City at Joie Stadium.

items.title: Liverpool close on CL knockouts with big win over Marseille
items.summary: Liverpool moved up to fourth in the Champions League table with an impressive 3-0 win over Marseille at the Stade Velodrome.

items.title: Newcastle boost last-16 hopes by cruising to PSV win
items.summary: Newcastle moved into the top eight of the Champions League with a crucial 3-0 win against PSV Eindhoven, teeing up a blockbuster clash against reigning champions Paris Saint-Germain to decide their fate in their final game.

items.title: Caicedo edges Rosenior's Chelsea to Pafos win and into CL top eight
items.summary: A late Moises Caicedo header gave Chelsea a hard-fought 1-0 win over minnows Pafos and boosted their automatic qualification hopes for the Champions League last 16.

items.title: Barnes seals easy win against PSV but Newcastle face wait over Guimarães
items.summary: There are many ways to self-destruct on a football pitch but PSV Eindhoven chose one of the more obvious methods. In opting to play out slowly from the back against high-pressing opponents possessing forwards blessed with the speed and skill of Yoane Wissa and Anthony Gordon, Peter Bosz’s team were always likely to come undone. Continue reading...

items.title: Moisés Caicedo salvages win for wasteful Chelsea against battling Pafos
items.summary: Liam Rosenior’s first taste of managing in the Champions League will not live long in the memory. Chelsea toiled against determined underdogs and were at risk of a humiliating result before a late header from Moisés Caicedo kept alive their hopes of direct qualification into the last 16. Victory lifted Chelsea to eighth in the standings. Yet they will have to be much better when they visit Napoli in their final game next week. FC Pafos were comfortable for long spells and Rosenior’s fourth game in charge had threatened to become an ordeal before Caicedo broke the Cypriot champions. Continue reading...
